last_run.summary: Review-findings patch started: closing P0-P3 claim-boundary findings while preserving Phase 3 environment open items.

validation.summary: Phase 5 validation passed. QA tests 5 passed. Tournament smoke produced JSON/CSV/Markdown under results/qa/smoke with Elo final_rating=1019.096194169577 and objective metrics present. AgentBench/core/scenarios/API/scripts regression tests 40 passed. MiniMOBA/training/algorithms regression tests 103 passed, 1 skipped. compileall and ruff passed.

open_items.item: cmake is not installed in the current environment, so cpp_inference configure/build was not run.
ONNXRUNTIME_ROOT is not set; C++ ONNX Runtime headers/libs were not available for the optional C++ inference target.
CUDA/TensorRT acceleration was not validated; no TensorRT speedup claim is made.

phase_history.name: MARL + Offline RL Foundation
phase_history.summary: CTDE global state is separate from actor observations; synthetic replay round-trip is deterministic; BC loss decreases; CQL/IQL smoke losses are finite; objective reachability guard blocks zero-objective claims.

phase_history.name: Distributed Actor-Learner Training Skeleton
phase_history.summary: Actors and learner are logically decoupled through local message contracts and a bounded queue; policy version lag is observable; V-trace has deterministic tests; CPU smoke run completes without network services.

phase_history.name: ONNX / C++ / TensorRT Inference Path
phase_history.summary: PyTorch to ONNX export and ONNX Runtime CPU parity passed; C++ runtime skeleton is present; CMake, C++ ONNX Runtime, CUDA, and TensorRT remain environment open items.

phase_history.name: LLM Planner x RL Controller Hybrid Brain
phase_history.summary: RulePlanner remains deterministic default; LLM stub outputs strict JSON; invalid planner output is rejected; macro adapter converts planner decisions to explicit reward and legal action-mask biases without bypassing MiniMOBA action masks.

phase_history.name: Automated QA / Rating / Tournament Evaluation Loop
phase_history.summary: Elo is the default rating system; TrueSkill-like remains optional; tournament reports are generated under results/qa; gates include hard_win_rate, base_exposed_rate, avg_base_damage, and avg_tower_damage.
